phrases.en: Hi, I'd like to buy a SIM card for internet.
phrases.zh: 你好，我想買一張上網用的SIM卡。
phrases.tip: 也可說 a data SIM card

phrases.en: Do you have a SIM card for tourists?
phrases.zh: 你們有給觀光客用的SIM卡嗎？

phrases.en: How many gigabytes do I get?
How many days is it valid for?
Is the data unlimited?
phrases.zh: 這是吃到飽（無限流量）嗎？
phrases.tip: unlimited = 無限；避免說 Is it unlimited data?

phrases.en: Which plan is best for a family of four?
phrases.zh: 四口之家用哪個方案最好？
phrases.tip: a family of four = 四口之家

phrases.en: Can you help me set it up?
phrases.tip: set it up = 設定安裝

phrases.en: Can you put the SIM card in for me?
phrases.zh: 可以幫我把SIM卡裝進手機嗎？

phrases.en: I'd like an eSIM instead. Can I scan a QR code?
Where do I scan the QR code to activate it?
My data isn't working. Can you check it?
phrases.zh: 我的網路不通，可以幫我看一下嗎？

phrases.en: How do I top up when I run out of data?
phrases.zh: 流量用完了要怎麼儲值？

phrases.en: Can I top up online with a credit card?
phrases.zh: 可以用信用卡線上儲值嗎？

phrases.en: Excuse me, what's the Wi-Fi password here?
phrases.zh: 不好意思，這裡的Wi-Fi密碼是什麼？

phrases.en: Is there free Wi-Fi in this area?
The Wi-Fi keeps disconnecting.

lines.en: Hi! How can I help you today?
lines.zh: 你好！有什麼需要幫忙的嗎？

alt.en: Welcome! Looking for a SIM card?
Hello there! What can I get for you?

lines.en: Hi, I'd like to buy a SIM card for internet.
lines.zh: 你好，我想買一張上網用的SIM卡。

lines.en: Sure. How many days will you be staying?
lines.zh: 好的，你們會待幾天？

alt.en: Of course. How long is your trip?
No problem. How many days do you need it for?

lines.en: Ten days, and we're a family of four.
lines.zh: 十天，我們是四口之家。

lines.en: This plan gives you unlimited data for ten days. Would that work?
lines.zh: 這個方案是十天吃到飽，可以嗎？

alt.en: I'd recommend this ten-day unlimited plan. Sound good?
alt.zh: 我推薦這個十天吃到飽方案，好嗎？

lines.en: That sounds great. Can you help me set it up?
lines.zh: 聽起來不錯，可以幫我裝好嗎？

lines.en: Of course. May I see your phone, please?
lines.zh: 當然，可以借你的手機看一下嗎？

lines.en: Here you go. Also, how do I top up if we run out?
lines.zh: 給你。另外，如果用完了要怎麼儲值？

lines.en: You can top up online with a credit card anytime.
lines.zh: 你隨時可以用信用卡在線上儲值。

lines.en: Perfect. My data is working now. Thank you!
lines.zh: 太好了，我的網路通了，謝謝！

title: 藥局
desc: 買成藥、症狀描述、用法用量

phrases.en: Hi, I'm not feeling well. Can you help me?
phrases.zh: 你好，我不太舒服，可以幫我嗎？

phrases.en: I have a headache.
phrases.tip: 換症狀：a fever 發燒／a stomachache 肚子痛

phrases.en: I have a fever and a sore throat.
I have an upset stomach.
phrases.tip: 拉肚子的婉轉說法，比 diarrhea 好開口

phrases.en: I have diarrhea.
phrases.tip: diarrhea 唸 /ˌdaɪəˈriːə/；婉轉版說 I have an upset stomach.

phrases.en: I think I caught a cold.
Do you have any painkillers?
Do you have medicine for an upset stomach?
phrases.zh: 有沒有治肚子不舒服的藥？

phrases.en: Do you have anything for motion sickness?
Do you have an antihistamine for allergies?
Do you sell insect repellent?
Do you have cream for a sunburn?
Can I get some Band-Aids?
Do you have anything for diarrhea?
Do you have a laxative?
Where can I find feminine hygiene products?
phrases.tip: feminine hygiene products = 生理用品；pads 衛生棉

phrases.en: Is there something for a runny nose?
How do I take this?
How many times a day should I take it?
Should I take it before or after meals?
Are there any side effects?
Will this make me drowsy?
Do I need a prescription for this?
Is this safe for children?
I'm allergic to aspirin. Is this okay?
phrases.zh: 我對阿斯匹靈過敏，這個可以吃嗎？
phrases.homophone: 愛姆 阿勒吉克 兔 阿斯匹林

lines.en: Hello, how can I help you?
lines.zh: 你好，有什麼需要幫忙的嗎？

alt.en: Hi there, what can I do for you?
Good afternoon. Are you looking for anything?

lines.en: Hi, I'm not feeling well. I think I caught a cold.
lines.zh: 你好，我不太舒服，我好像感冒了。

lines.en: I'm sorry to hear that. What are your symptoms?
lines.zh: 真遺憾，你有哪些症狀？

alt.en: Oh no. Can you tell me your symptoms?
alt.zh: 糟糕，可以說說你的症狀嗎？

lines.en: I have a fever, a headache, and a runny nose.
lines.zh: 我發燒、頭痛，還流鼻水。

lines.en: This cold medicine should help. Take one tablet three times a day.
lines.zh: 這個感冒藥應該有幫助，一天吃三次、一次一顆。

alt.en: Try this cold medicine, one pill three times daily.
alt.zh: 試試這個感冒藥，一天三次、一次一顆。

lines.en: Should I take it before or after meals?
lines.zh: 飯前還是飯後吃？

lines.en: After meals, please. And drink plenty of water.
lines.zh: 請飯後吃，並多喝水。

lines.en: Are there any side effects? Will it make me drowsy?
lines.zh: 有副作用嗎？吃了會想睡嗎？

lines.en: It might make you a little sleepy, so avoid driving.
lines.zh: 可能會有點想睡，所以不要開車。

lines.en: Got it. One more thing — I'm allergic to aspirin. Is this okay?
lines.zh: 了解。還有一件事，我對阿斯匹靈過敏，這個可以嗎？

lines.en: No aspirin in this one, so you're fine. Feel better soon!
lines.zh: 這款沒有阿斯匹靈，所以沒問題。祝你早日康復！

title: 看病
desc: 掛號、描述病情、拿藥、保險

phrases.en: I'd like to see a doctor, please.
Where's the emergency room?
phrases.tip: 美式用 emergency room（ER）；英式用 A&E
phrases.homophone: 威爾斯 勒 伊墨真西 潤

phrases.en: I don't have an appointment. Is that okay?
How long is the wait?
I've had a fever since yesterday.
It hurts here.
I have a bad cough and a sore throat.
phrases.zh: 我咳得很厲害，還喉嚨痛。

phrases.en: I've been throwing up since this morning.
The pain is getting worse.
I'm allergic to penicillin.
phrases.homophone: 愛姆 阿勒吉克 兔 盤尼西林

phrases.en: Do I need any medicine?
Where can I pick up the medicine?
I have travel insurance. Can I get a receipt?
phrases.zh: 我有旅遊保險，可以給我收據嗎？

phrases.en: Can you give me an itemized bill for insurance?
phrases.zh: 可以給我明細收據報保險嗎？

phrases.en: Could you write me a medical certificate?
phrases.zh: 可以幫我開診斷證明嗎？

phrases.en: How much will this cost?
Do you accept credit cards?

lines.en: Hi, come in and have a seat. What brings you in today?
lines.zh: 你好，請進坐下。今天哪裡不舒服？

alt.en: Please have a seat. What seems to be the problem?
Come on in. How are you feeling today?

lines.en: I've had a fever since yesterday, and it's getting worse.
lines.zh: 我從昨天開始發燒，而且越來越嚴重。

lines.en: Any other symptoms?
lines.zh: 還有其他症狀嗎？

alt.zh: 還有覺得哪裡不對勁嗎？

lines.en: Yes, a bad cough and a sore throat. It hurts here.
lines.zh: 有，咳得很厲害還喉嚨痛，這裡會痛。

lines.en: Let me take a look. Are you allergic to any medication?
lines.zh: 我看一下。你對任何藥物過敏嗎？

alt.en: I'll examine you. Do you have any drug allergies?
alt.zh: 我檢查一下，你對藥物有過敏嗎？

lines.en: Yes, I'm allergic to penicillin.
lines.zh: 有，我對盤尼西林過敏。

lines.en: Noted. It looks like a throat infection. I'll prescribe some medicine.
lines.zh: 記下了。看起來是喉嚨發炎，我開些藥給你。

lines.en: Thank you. Where can I pick up the medicine?
lines.zh: 謝謝，藥要去哪裡拿？

lines.en: At the pharmacy next door. Get plenty of rest.
lines.zh: 隔壁的藥局就有，記得多休息。

lines.en: I have travel insurance. Could you write me a medical certificate and an itemized bill?
lines.zh: 我有旅遊保險，可以幫我開診斷證明和明細收據嗎？

lines.en: Of course. The front desk will prepare everything for you.
lines.zh: 當然，櫃台會幫你準備好所有文件。

title: 緊急求助
desc: 報警、急重症求救、東西遺失、找辦事處

phrases.en: Help!
phrases.homophone: 黑ㄜ普

phrases.en: I need help, please.
phrases.homophone: 愛 尼德 黑ㄜ普 普利斯

phrases.en: It's an emergency.
phrases.homophone: 依次 嗯 伊墨真西

phrases.en: Call the police!
phrases.homophone: 摳 勒 波利斯

phrases.en: Call an ambulance!
phrases.tip: 美國 911 一線通報警與救護
phrases.homophone: 摳 嗯 安布勒斯

phrases.en: I need a doctor.
phrases.homophone: 愛 尼德 阿 搭克特

phrases.en: He's having a heart attack.
phrases.homophone: 喜斯 哈聖 阿 哈特 阿泰克

phrases.en: She's not breathing.
phrases.homophone: 需斯 那 布利丁

phrases.en: He's unconscious.
phrases.homophone: 喜斯 安康雪斯

phrases.en: She's choking.
phrases.homophone: 需斯 秋慶

phrases.en: I'm having an allergic reaction — I need my EpiPen.
phrases.zh: 我過敏發作了，我需要我的腎上腺素筆。
phrases.tip: EpiPen = 過敏急救腎上腺素筆
phrases.homophone: 愛姆 哈聖 嗯 阿勒吉克 瑞阿克遜 — 愛 尼德 買 艾皮潘

phrases.en: He's having a seizure.
phrases.homophone: 喜斯 哈聖 阿 西擷兒

phrases.en: I'm diabetic.
phrases.tip: diabetic = 糖尿病患；急救時很重要
phrases.homophone: 愛姆 呆阿貝提克

phrases.en: I'm pregnant.
phrases.tip: pregnant = 懷孕；用藥／急救須知
phrases.homophone: 愛姆 普瑞格能特

phrases.en: Someone snatched my bag!
phrases.tip: snatch = 一把搶走，比 took 有力
phrases.homophone: 桑萬 史那取 買 背格

phrases.en: I've been pickpocketed!
phrases.homophone: 愛夫 賓 匹克帕基提

phrases.en: My wallet was stolen.
I lost my passport.
phrases.tip: 換物品：wallet 皮夾／phone 手機

phrases.en: I want to report a theft.
We're near the train station.
phrases.tip: 先報位置最重要；套用你所在地標
phrases.homophone: 威爾 尼爾 勒 全 史迪遜

phrases.en: The address is here on my phone.
phrases.tip: 慌亂時直接把手機地址給對方看
phrases.homophone: 勒 阿追斯 伊斯 喜爾 昂 買 風

phrases.en: Does anyone here speak Chinese?
phrases.tip: 找到會中文的人能救急
phrases.homophone: 達斯 安尼萬 喜爾 斯必克 差伊尼斯

phrases.en: I need an interpreter.
phrases.homophone: 愛 尼德 嗯 因特普特

phrases.en: My child is missing!
phrases.homophone: 買 差伊爾德 伊斯 密性

phrases.en: He's a five-year-old boy in a red shirt.
phrases.zh: 他是個穿紅衣服的五歲男孩。
phrases.tip: 描述走失孩童：年齡＋衣服顏色

phrases.en: I'm lost. Can you help me?
Where is the nearest police station?
Where is the nearest hospital?
No, thank you.
phrases.tip: 遇到糾纏／推銷，堅定拒絕

phrases.en: Please leave me alone.
phrases.homophone: 普利斯 立夫 密 阿龍

phrases.en: I'm not interested.
I need to contact the Taiwan representative office.
phrases.zh: 我要聯絡台灣的辦事處。
phrases.tip: 台灣駐外多為 representative office

phrases.en: Do you have the number for the Taiwan office?
phrases.zh: 你有台灣辦事處的電話嗎？

phrases.en: Please write it down for me.
phrases.tip: 慌亂時最好請對方寫下

lines.en: Help! My wallet was stolen!
lines.zh: 救命！我的皮夾被偷了！

lines.en: Okay, take a breath — I'll help you. Where did it happen?
lines.zh: 好，深呼吸，我來幫你。是在哪裡發生的？

alt.en: It's okay, I've got you. When did this happen?
alt.zh: 沒事，有我在。什麼時候發生的？

alt.en: Alright, you're safe now. Tell me where it happened.
alt.zh: 好，你現在安全了。告訴我在哪裡發生的。

lines.en: On the train, just now. Someone snatched it from my bag.
lines.zh: 剛剛在火車上，有人從我包包裡搶走的。

lines.en: What was inside?
lines.zh: 裡面有什麼？

alt.en: Can you tell me what was in it?
alt.zh: 可以告訴我裡面有什麼嗎？

lines.en: My cash, credit cards, and my passport.
lines.zh: 現金、信用卡，還有我的護照。

lines.en: Okay, I'll help you file a report. May I see your ID?
lines.zh: 好，我幫你報案，可以看你的身分證件嗎？

alt.en: Let's file a report right away. Do you have any ID?
alt.zh: 我們馬上報案，你有帶證件嗎？

lines.en: Here. I want to report a theft. It's an emergency.
lines.zh: 在這裡。我要報案失竊，這是緊急狀況。

lines.en: Understood. You'll need this police report for insurance.
lines.zh: 了解，這份報案證明你辦保險會用到。

lines.en: Thank you. I also need to contact the Taiwan representative office. Do you have the number?
lines.zh: 謝謝。我還需要聯絡台灣辦事處，你有電話嗎？

lines.en: Yes, let me write it down for you.
lines.zh: 有，我幫你寫下來。

lines.en: Thank you so much for your help.
lines.zh: 非常感謝你的幫忙。
